lines: Muze mwes' abakijijwe, Abazinutsw' iby' isi; Nimwikorer' umusaraba : Ni w' ubaneshereza.
Umusaraba ni wo bendera Yacu tw' abakijijwe!Twemeye n'isoni zawo : Ni w'
Umusaraba w'isoni N' irembo rifunganye. Uduhata kwiyambura Ibituremerera.
Nuko twiyambure byose.Tumere nka ya mpurnyi, Uko  itanze gut' umwenda,Ngw isang' Umwami Yesu.
Twajyaga dutiny' urupfu :Yes' arugir' irembo Ritugeza vuba cyane Mu bwami
Ibikangisho by'Umwanzi N' iby'intar' iziriiswe : Ni tudat' inzira yacu, Ntabw'
Uzura n'lmana vuba Kubw' urupfu rwa Yesu : Amaraso y'Umusaraba Ni y'
